events.name: P!NK
events.info: P!NK SE PRESENTARÁ EN MÉXICO CON EL ESPERADO CARNIVAL TOUR 26 ABRIL 2026 ? ESTADIO GNP SEGUROS La cantante, intérprete, icono del pop internacional y ganadora de tres premios Grammy, P!NK, anuncia hoy su esperado show en México. La gira Carnival Tour llegará al Estadio GNP Seguros de la Ciudad de México, el próximo 26 de abril de 2026. Desde su debut en 2000, P!NK ha lanzado 8 álbumes de estudio y 1 álbum de grandes éxitos, ha vendido más de 60 millones de discos equivalentes en todo el mundo, logrado 15 sencillos en el top 10 del Billboard Hot 100 (cuatro de ellos en el #1) y ha llenado arenas y estadios en todo el mundo. P!NK apoya activamente a numerosas organizaciones benéficas, incluyendo No Kid Hungry, Make-a-Wish Foundation, Planned Parenthood, REVERB, Autism Speaks y Human Rights Campaign, y se desempeña como embajadora de UNICEF USA.
events.pleaseNote: Límite de edad: Sin Limite de Edad. Pagan boleto a partir de: 3 Años. Restricciones: Prohibido ingresar con objetos punzocortantes, mascotas, lasers, comida y/o bebida, sombrillas, aerosoles, bolsas que superen los 30x30cm, botellas de cualquier tipo, latas, sillas, cobijas, anforitas, navajas, pirotecnia, spray pimienta, drogas, sustancias ilícitas, cámaras profesionales de foto y/o video o equipo profesional de grabación de audio Límite de acceso: Recomendamos asistir con anticipación. Servicios: Venta de alimentos, bebidas y mercancía oficial. Sanitarios. Atención a personas con discapacidad Duración aproximada: 2 horas Límite de boletos: 8. Observaciones: Se recomienda descargar boletos Safetix con anticipación

venues.parkingDetail: Please use the official Stadium car parks if driving to the venue, available to pre-book by visiting www.wembleyofficialparking.com. A resident's only parking permit scheme operates in the Wembley area on Stadium event days. Illegally parked vehicles will be fined by Brent Council and may be towed away. For details of the restrictions visit www.brent.gov.uk/wembley
venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: Wembley Stadium has wheelchair accessible spaces with an equal number of adjacent seats available for Personal Assistants. Wembley Stadium also have enhanced amenity seats for ambulant disabled visitors, each disabled seating area has a dedicated member of staff. Staff on disabled bays are specifically trained to meet the requirements of disabled visitors. Wembley Stadium has 147 accessible toilets within the Stadium, all accessible via RADAR keys. There are also 193 Ambulant Toilets. The toilets are available on all levels. Please see the event sale page for information on booking accessible tickets for your chosen event

generalInfo.generalRule: No cameras, video cameras or audio recording devices. Wembley Stadium has a restricted bag policy Each person can only bring one small bag, and it must not be bigger than A4 size Height 297mm (11.7 inches) Width 210mm (8.27 inches) Depth 210mm (8.27 inches)
generalInfo.childRule: Seated area: No children under 2 years old. Standing area: No children under 14 years old. All children under 16 years old must be accompanied by an adult.

ada.adaCustomCopy:
All accessible tickets for the London shows are available only through the Wembley Stadium Disability Access Ticketing Line, unless otherwise stated on the individual event page. 

If you have access requirements, please ensure you purchase your tickets directly from Wembley Stadium as they are unable to transfer general admission tickets to accessible seating areas or add essential companion tickets to existing bookings made through other ticketing providers.


If you wish to purchase accessible tickets and/or require an essential companion for an upcoming event at Wembley Stadium, https://help.wembleystadium.com/support/solutions/articles/7000028451-purchase-accessible-tickets-nimbus-supporting-documentation  [copy and paste link]


Wembley Stadium is now working with Nimbus Disability, using their Access Card technology to help improve the ticketing process and enhance stadium access for guests with accessibility requirements. You can either use your current Nimbus Access Card or apply for the FREE Wembley Digital Access Pass(DAP). There's no need to repeatedly explain your access requirements or submit supporting documents for every booking at Wembley Stadium. 
Once registered, your Access Card or Wembley DAP securely stores your access requirements, allowing the team to assist you more efficiently.

For all information on events at Wembley Stadium please visit the Help Centre at https://help.wembleystadium.com/support/home [copy and paste link]

ada.adaCustomCopy:
All accessible tickets for the London shows are available only through the Wembley Stadium Disability Access Ticketing Line, unless otherwise stated on the individual event page. 

If you have access requirements, please ensure you purchase your tickets directly from Wembley Stadium as they are unable to transfer general admission tickets to accessible seating areas or add essential companion tickets to existing bookings made through other ticketing providers.


If you wish to purchase accessible tickets and/or require an essential companion for an upcoming event at Wembley Stadium, https://help.wembleystadium.com/support/solutions/articles/7000028451-purchase-accessible-tickets-nimbus-supporting-documentation  [copy and paste link]


Wembley Stadium is now working with Nimbus Disability, using their Access Card technology to help improve the ticketing process and enhance stadium access for guests with accessibility requirements. You can either use your current Nimbus Access Card or apply for the FREE Wembley Digital Access Pass(DAP). There's no need to repeatedly explain your access requirements or submit supporting documents for every booking at Wembley Stadium. 
Once registered, your Access Card or Wembley DAP securely stores your access requirements, allowing the team to assist you more efficiently.

For all information on events at Wembley Stadium please visit the Help Centre at https://help.wembleystadium.com/support/home [copy and paste link]

events.name: The Spinners
events.info: Most often thought of as a Motown recording act, the classic group sound of legendary R&B recording artists The Spinners has never lost its universal appeal. Throughout the years they have sold millions of records and topped both the Pop and R&B charts with smash hits like I'll Be Around, One of a Kind (Love Affair), Then Came You, Could It Be I'm Falling in Love, It's a Shame, and Rubberband Man. The Spinners have six Grammy nominations and have been inducted into the Vocal Group Hall of Fame. The group has performed for presidents, received a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame, and has appeared in numerous network and cable television specials paying tribute to the music of the 70's.
